source_refs.title: Source Title
source_refs.relevance: Why this source constrains the digest.

historical_context.summary: Short description of the flashpoint and why it is grounded enough for training.

public_facts.text: Fact known to ordinary participants in this scene.

ambient_pressures.text: Large institutional or material pressure shaping the scene.

groups.label: Observer faction, institution, class, profession, or subculture label
institutional_logic: What this group exists to preserve, control, repair, extract, or protect.
material_incentives: What the group is rewarded for doing under this system.
internal_shames: What insiders experience as disgrace or loss of standing.
prestige_markers: Signals that read as competence, status, holiness, discipline, care, etc.
taboo_triggers: Acts or traits that provoke disgust, fear, sanction, or exclusion.
emotional_display_norms: What emotional expression is permitted, admired, punished, or disguised.
trust_defaults: Who this group is primed to trust, distrust, pity, envy, use, or fear.
speech_register_cues: Formality, compression, politeness, ritual, jargon, softness, command voice, etc.

groups.label: Target faction, institution, class, profession, or subculture label
institutional_logic: What this group exists to preserve, control, repair, extract, or protect.
material_incentives: What the group is rewarded for doing under this system.
internal_shames: What insiders experience as disgrace or loss of standing.
prestige_markers: Signals that read as competence, status, holiness, discipline, care, etc.
taboo_triggers: Acts or traits that provoke disgust, fear, sanction, or exclusion.
emotional_display_norms: What emotional expression is permitted, admired, punished, or disguised.
trust_defaults: Who this group is primed to trust, distrust, pity, envy, use, or fear.
speech_register_cues: Formality, compression, politeness, ritual, jargon, softness, command voice, etc.

cultural_pressure_fields.summary: Describe a reusable cultural pressure without reducing the group to a flat trait.
cultural_pressure_fields.projection_use: How this pressure should change a speaker-local prompt under scene stress.

observer_read: How the observer group tends to stereotype or misread the target.
target_self_read: How the target group understands the same behavior internally.
misread_patterns: Specific translation errors that can drive conflict.
likely_insults: Loaded words, euphemisms, or social accusations likely to appear.
factional_misread_matrix.projection_use: How to render this misread as pressure prose, not a command to be stereotypical.

obligations: What the role must do to remain legitimate.
available_masks: Performances this role can use under pressure.
failure_modes: How this role breaks, corrupts, freezes, overreaches, or betrays itself.

known_context.text: What this speaker knows from the lore slice.

beliefs.text: What this speaker believes or assumes.

misreads.text: What this speaker gets wrong or overgeneralizes.

must_not_know.text: Author-only fact, future outcome, or other speaker's private context to exclude.

author_only_boundaries.text: Canon fact or planned outcome that constrains authors but must not enter speaker prompt text.

open_questions.question: What needs elaboration before this digest can produce training data?
open_questions.notes: Say whether this blocks examples or can wait.
